phrases.intent_en: Where is the festival grounds entrance
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Eingang zum Festgelände?
phrases.cultural_note: In Switzerland, festival grounds typically have a clearly marked main entrance with signage.

likely_response.translation_en: To the right behind the ruins.

responses.english: To the right behind the ruins.

phrases.intent_en: Are food vendors at the festival today
phrases.text_local: Gibt es heute Essenstände auf dem Fest?
phrases.cultural_note: German-speaking regions often have festival-specific vendor areas clearly indicated.

phrases.intent_en: How do I find the Unspunnen Stone
phrases.cultural_note: The Unspunnen Stone is a well-known local monument often highlighted at the festival.

likely_response.translation_en: At the festival grounds, above the ruins.

responses.english: At the festival grounds, above the ruins.
